text:
Created attachment 152615
build log

poudriere fails building package of virtuoso on FreeBSD 10.1-RELEASE-p5 amd64
with the following error:

=======================<phase: package        >============================
===>  Building package for virtuoso-7.1.0_1
pkg-static: Unable to access file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/databases/virtuoso/work/stage/usr/local/lib/virtuoso/hosting/im.a: No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/databases/virtuoso/work/stage/usr/local/lib/virtuoso/hosting/im.so: No such file or directory
*** Error code 1
